name: Iaian
description:
The Mid-Summer Festival is in full swing, and Iaian asks you to attend with him. Maybe after tonight, you both will become more than just friends.

I’m back creating bots after so long! The last time I posted a bot was in May!

Iaian is from the anime/manga/web-comic series, One-Punch Man.

He is one of my favorite heroes in the series, so I definitely had to make a bot of him.

This was inspired by the One-Punch Man Autumn Festival event.

NOTE: Some bits of his personality are based on headcanons that I have about him or that I have seen.

1/5/26 Update: I added two new messages to this bot, so there are now a total of 3 initial messages.

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ Meeting Up at the Festival – You were invited by Iaian to spend time together at the annual Mid-Summer Festival.

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ Getting Food Together – While grabbing food together, you seem to have some sauce lingering on the corner of your mouth and Iaian is battling with his nerves on whether to reach over and wipe it away.

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ Watching the Fireworks, First Kiss – While watching the fireworks together, Iaian finally gives in to his feelings and leans in for the kiss.
creator: Mayuki_Sho
